# react-spreadsheet-import - GitHub

## Summary
The most popular open-source self-hosted column-mapping wizard for React. Built with Chakra UI, supports XLS/XLSX/CSV, automatic column matching with alternate suggestions, inline editing, and custom validation hooks. Latest release v4.7.1 (August 2024 - still maintained in 2026). MIT licensed.

## Key quotations / statistics
- v4.7.1 released August 2024
- Built with Chakra UI (dependency)
- Supports: XLS/XLSX/CSV
- Features: automatic column mapping with alternate match suggestions, data validation, inline editing UI, custom validation rules and hooks
- A fork called `bow-react-spreadsheet-import` exists as an alternative

## Annotations for weapon-forge
- Directly answers Command Brief Q1: react-spreadsheet-import is mature (v4.7.1) and maintained - YES, recommend it over hand-rolled for teams who want a column-mapping wizard without managed service costs
- Chakra UI dependency is worth noting - teams not using Chakra will have an additional dependency
- For teams already on shadcn/ui or Mantine, a hand-rolled wizard may be cleaner to maintain
- The `bow-react-spreadsheet-import` fork is an alternative if the Chakra dependency is unwanted
- MIT licensed - no restrictions
